basic_details.job_title: KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Kudumbashree Broiler Farmers' Producer Company Limited (KBFPCL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Driver cum Salesman. Candidates with 12th Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through KBFPCL official website cmd.kerala.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Plus Two (12th standard) or equivalent, Valid Driving License (LMV with badge), Minimum 2 years of experience in driving and/or sales field, Basic proficiency in reading and writing Malayalam and English

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KBFPCL Driver cum Salesman Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
